channel.title: theBalancedBriefNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from theBalancedBriefNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The economy is booming. So why is the job market lagging?
item.description: The U.S. economy is on a tear

item.title: San Francisco parents scramble as teachers strike leaves 50,000 students out of school
item.description: Connor Haught is juggling work and child care as San Francisco faces a teachers strike with no end in sight

item.title: A person has been detained for questioning in disappearance of Nancy Guthrie, sheriff's office says
item.description: Officials say a person has been detained for questioning in the disappearance of Nancy Guthrie

item.title: Alex Murdaugh continues to insist he didn't kill wife and son as he gets another day in court
item.description: Alex Murdaugh's lawyers are asking the South Carolina Supreme Court to overturn his murder convictions

item.title: Winning numbers drawn in Tuesday’s Mega Millions
item.description: The winning numbers in Tuesday evening’s drawing of the "Mega Millions" game were: 05-25-30-36-68, Mega Ball: 6, Megaplier:
